---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# exculding momentum

## trace

```{julia}
# product shadows
using RandomMeas
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit",4);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(measurement_group);
```

```{julia}
# tr(ρ)
#@show estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 1, compute_sem = true); # Cross-validation, but it consumes a lot of memory.
@show estimate = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 1);
```

```{julia}
# tr(ρ^2)
#@show estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 2, compute_sem = true);
@show estimate = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 2);
```

```{julia}
# multiply
multiply(dense_shadows[1], dense_shadows[1]);
```
